basic_details.job_title: Doordarshan Kendra Chandigarh Stringer/ Cameramen Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Doordarshan Kendra Chandigarh has released the official Stringer/ Cameramen Notification 2026 on 13 May 2026 at prasarbharati.gov.in. Eligible candidates with a Graduate qualification and experience in visual coverage, cinematography/videography/news gathering/broadcast journalism, and equipped with four-wheel vehicles can apply offline from 13 May 2026 to 15 June 2026. The official notification PDF and offline application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with experience in visual coverage, cinematography/videography/news gathering/broadcast journalism, and equipped with four-wheel vehicles.
qualification.details: Experience in visual coverage Experience in cinematography/videography/news gathering/broadcast journalism Equipped with four-wheel vehicles Minimum Qualification: Graduate

salary_details.pay_scale: Local coverage: Rs. 1500 for 6 hours, Rs. 1000 for additional 6 hours. Outstation coverage: Rs. 1800.
salary_details.details: Local Coverage (up to 6 hours): Rs. 1500 Local Coverage (exceeding 6 hours or locations > 10 km): Rs. 1000 (for second coverage) Outstation Coverage: Rs. 1800

selection_process: Preliminary Scrutiny Test coverage Interview Verification of equipment and documents Final List
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Doordarshan Kendra Chandigarh Stringer/ Cameramen Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: prasarbharati.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
